tasks.subject: [Phase 1] Embed dynamic SVG template in bus.html, switch to DOM-based rendering
tasks.description:
Replace the current buildSvg()→innerHTML string approach with a live SVG element in the DOM. Create src/bus/renderer.js exporting renderSign(state) and getSignSvgString(). Embed the SVG from public/assets/bus/templates/dynamic_svg_template_for_resizing_bus_sign_based_on_number_of_routes.svg inline in bus.html. Wire all existing inputs to call renderSign(). Single-route only at this step. See plan Task 1.1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bus.html", "src/bus/renderer.js"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -m http.server 8080 → open localhost:8080/bus.html → sign renders; edit fields → updates live", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Sign renders on load", "Live updates on input", "Visual parity with alpha"]}
```

tasks.subject: [Phase 1] Implement route cloning and Y-axis positioning in renderer.js
tasks.description:
renderSign(state) clones route-item-template for each route beyond the first, appending clones to extra-routes-container. Y-start for each clone is calculated after a requestAnimationFrame tick by measuring the previous route's destination div offsetHeight. Formula: nextY = currentY + 200 + 20 + textHeight + 67. See plan Task 1.2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/bus/renderer.js"], "verifyCommand": "browser console: renderSign with 2-route state → 2 routes visible without overlap", "acceptanceCriteria": ["2 routes no overlap", "3 routes with long text no overlap", "First route at Y=50"]}
```

tasks.subject: [Phase 1] Implement _applyDominoEffect() in renderer.js
tasks.description:
When bottomEdge > 1250, apply extraHeight to: white-bg height, tow-zone translate, bottom-yellow translate, SVG viewBox, outer-border path regex. See plan Task 1.3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/bus/renderer.js"], "verifyCommand": "browser: 3 long-route sign → viewBox height > 2065", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Tow Zone below routes", "viewBox expands", "No false trigger on short sign"]}
```

tasks.subject: [Phase 1] Build multi-route custom form UI (add/remove up to 5 route blocks)
tasks.description:
Replace single-route fields with dynamic form using <template> cloning. Add Route / Remove buttons. Max 5 routes. Every change calls refresh(). See plan Task 1.4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bus.html"], "verifyCommand": "browser: add 3 routes → sign renders all 3; remove one → sign updates", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Add/remove works", "Disabled states correct", "Re-renders on every change"]}
```

tasks.subject: [Phase 1] Verify SVG/PNG export works with DOM-based rendering and Domino resize
tasks.description:
Confirm all three export paths. Fix PNG canvas to read height from live viewBox. Test single-route and multi-route (Domino triggered) exports. See plan Task 1.5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bus.html"], "verifyCommand": "download SVG with 3-route sign → open in browser → full sign visible", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SVG export valid", "PNG height = viewBox × 2", "Domino sign not clipped"]}
```

tasks.subject: [Phase 2] Get MBTA API key from user and add to src/bus/api.js
tasks.description:
User pastes MBTA V3 API key. Insert into API_KEY constant in src/bus/api.js with TODO comment for Phase 10 Vercel proxy move.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/bus/api.js"], "verifyCommand": "browser console: fetchBusRoutes() returns array", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Key present", "fetchBusRoutes works", "TODO comment present"]}
```

tasks.subject: [Phase 2] Create src/bus/api.js with fetchBusRoutes() and fetchStopsForRoute()
tasks.description:
Isolated ES module. fetchBusRoutes() returns {id, shortName, longName, isFrequent}[]. isFrequent = description === 'Frequent Bus'. fetchStopsForRoute(routeId) returns {id, name}[].

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/bus/api.js"], "verifyCommand": "browser console: fetchBusRoutes() → non-empty array; isFrequent correct on Route 1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fetchBusRoutes returns array", "isFrequent correct", "fetchStopsForRoute returns stops"]}
```

tasks.subject: [Phase 2] Add mode selector (Custom vs. Use MBTA Data) to bus.html
tasks.description:
Two toggle buttons switch panels. Custom shows multi-route form. API shows dropdowns panel. Custom works offline.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bus.html"], "verifyCommand": "browser: toggle modes → correct panels shown", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Toggle switches panels", "Custom works offline", "Active button styled"]}
```

tasks.subject: [Phase 2] Wire route dropdown — fetch and populate on API mode activation
tasks.description:
On API mode switch, fetch routes and populate select. Loading state. Cache result. Error message on failure.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bus.html"], "verifyCommand": "browser: switch to API mode → routes load; disconnect network → error message", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Routes populate", "Loading state", "Error message", "Cached"]}
```

tasks.subject: [Phase 2] Wire stop dropdown — fetch stops when route is chosen
tasks.description:
Selecting a route fetches and populates stop dropdown. Hidden until route chosen. Resets on route change.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bus.html"], "verifyCommand": "browser: select Route 1 → stops populate; change to Route 39 → stops refresh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Hidden until route chosen", "Stops load", "Stops reset on change"]}
```

tasks.subject: [Phase 2] Implement sign fill from selected API route + stop
tasks.description:
Selecting a stop fills route number, destination (stop name), stop number (stop id), clock (isFrequent). Switches to Custom mode. Fields editable post-fill.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bus.html"], "verifyCommand": "browser: Route 1 + stop → sign fills; edit dest → updates", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 fields filled", "Switches to Custom", "Editable post-fill"]}
```
